data.requirement: Derive home team using venue-city association from match_summary's 'venue' and 'teams' columns by string matching (e.g., 'Sydney' matches 'Australia') instead of geolocation mapping.
data.reason: Original approach required external geodata not present in schema. This revision uses existing venue naming patterns to infer home teams.

visualization.requirement: Heat matrix (not geospatial) with venues as rows, home/away win rate ratios as columns, color encoding dominance levels.
visualization.reason: Geospatial coordinates unavailable in data. Matrix maintains venue comparison while avoiding inaccurate geocoding.

visualization.requirement: Parallel coordinates plot instead of radar chart for team-venue profiles, with axes for normalized win_rate, runs, fours/sixes ratio.
visualization.reason: Radar charts become unreadable with many teams/venues. Parallel coordinates better handle multivariate comparisons.

interaction.requirement: Clicking a venue row in the heat matrix filters other views to that location.
interaction.reason: Adapted to new matrix visualization while maintaining drill-down capability.

interaction.requirement: REMOVED - No capacity data exists in schema
interaction.reason: External venue capacity data not available in provided tables
